sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47467" key="h(=per" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἧπερ</orth>, <sense id="n47467.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the same way as</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὅσπερ</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
